## Links 
![](figures/umichchemlogo.jpg)

- [University of Michigan Homepage](https://umich.edu/)

- [University of Michigan Chemistry Department](https://lsa.umich.edu/chem)

- [Program in Macromolecular Science and Engineering](https://macro.engin.umich.edu/)

- [Umich Vertere Chemical Inventory](https://chem-vim.chem.lsa.umich.edu/uom)

- [NMR Scheduler](https://lsa.umich.edu/chem/technical-services/nmr/news---scheduler.html)

- [Raman Spectroscopy](https://lsa.umich.edu/chem/technical-services/raman-spectroscopy.html)

- [Microporous Characterization](https://lsa.umich.edu/chem/technical-services/xray---microporous-materials-characterization.html)

- [Spectral Database for Organic Compounds](https://sdbs.db.aist.go.jp/)
